properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v3 v5

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Amazing grace How sweet the sound That saved a wretch like me I once was lost, but now I'm found Was blind, but now I see

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: 'Twas grace that taught my heart to fear And grace my fears relieved How precious did that grace appear The hour I first believed

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: My chains are gone I've been set free My God, my Savior has ransomed me And like a flood His mercy rains Unending love, Amazing grace

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: The Lord has promised good to me His word my hope secures He will my shield and portion be As long as life endures

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: The earth shall soon dissolve like snow The sun forebear to shine But God, Who called me here below Will be forever mine Will be forever mine You are forever mine
